steps.t: Mírthel can be found at Haerondir. You should talk to Mírthel.
A small ranger outpost is hidden in the Slag-hills. You should find Candúr in the Ranger outpost hidden by the Slag-hills.
Candúr can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should talk to Candúr and hear his message.
Thurindol can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills. You should talk to Thurindol.
